Lines.FullText: Interface representing a Synchronization Component in a Test & Measurement system.

Elements.RawText: Interface representing a Synchronization Component in a Test & Measurement system.

Lines.FullText: A SynchronizationComponent ensures synchronization among measurement devices in the system.

Elements.RawText: A SynchronizationComponent ensures synchronization among measurement devices in the system.

Lines.FullText: It can act as a sync source and/or as a sync output, with each component having one sync input

Elements.RawText: It can act as a sync source and/or as a sync output, with each component having one sync input

Lines.FullText: and 0 to n sync outputs.

Elements.RawText: and 0 to n sync outputs.

Brief.RawText:
* @brief Interface representing a Synchronization Component in a Test & Measurement system.
 * A SynchronizationComponent ensures synchronization among measurement devices in the system.
 * It can act as a sync source and/or as a sync output, with each component having one sync input
 * and 0 to n sync outputs.

Lines.FullText: Every SynchronizationComponent has at least one interface. Only one interface can be set

Elements.RawText: Every SynchronizationComponent has at least one interface. Only one interface can be set

Lines.FullText: as an input, while others can be used as sync outputs to synchronize other devices.

Elements.RawText: as an input, while others can be used as sync outputs to synchronize other devices.

Lines.FullText: The configuration of these interfaces and the reading of their status is defined in Part 4.

Elements.RawText: The configuration of these interfaces and the reading of their status is defined in Part 4.

Lines.FullText: Depending on the setup, some interfaces may be switched off, and some interfaces may

Elements.RawText: Depending on the setup, some interfaces may be switched off, and some interfaces may

Lines.FullText: act as sync sources or outputs.

Elements.RawText: act as sync sources or outputs.

Tags.RawText:
@note Depending on the setup, some interfaces may be switched off, and some interfaces may
 * act as sync sources or outputs.

Lines.FullText: A CLK interface can be used to let a device run in Fre-Run mode, where the device

Elements.RawText: A CLK interface can be used to let a device run in Fre-Run mode, where the device

Lines.FullText: syncs internally to an internal quartz.

Elements.RawText: syncs internally to an internal quartz.

Tags.RawText:
@note A CLK interface can be used to let a device run in Fre-Run mode, where the device
 * syncs internally to an internal quartz.

Lines.FullText: SynchronizationComponents are configured via interfaces, which can include PTP, IRIQ, GPS,

Elements.RawText: SynchronizationComponents are configured via interfaces, which can include PTP, IRIQ, GPS,

Lines.FullText: and CLK sync interfaces, among others.

Elements.RawText: and CLK sync interfaces, among others.

Description.RawText:
*
 * SynchronizationComponents are configured via interfaces, which can include PTP, IRIQ, GPS,
 * and CLK sync interfaces, among others.
